description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. This subtle hued floaters can also be worn as slip-on sandals with its removable back strap. Upper Suede straps over the forefoot and around the heel to lock the foot in place Velcro closures for snug comfort Removable back strap that can be attached to the elasticated loops at the midfoot, to transform the sandal to a slip-on Suede footbed with printed branding Curved toward the toe for protection of the forefoot Outsole TPR outsole with circular nubs and lugs Branding on the outsole Outsole stitched to the upper for maximum durability Sandal care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
